hypothesis: Loss-only long-response training left same-task prompt sensitivity at 0.0035 BPB and damaged base BPB. A neural prompt-memory adapter computed once from the final prefill patch, cached in persistent state, and applied as FiLM modulation gives response logits a direct prompt-dependent path. Freezing every source parameter guarantees the locked raw-English BPB lineage while adding only a cached vector operation per decoded byte.
